data.title: Author eval config for resolve-conflicts skill
data.description: Author a complete eval config for the resolve-conflicts skill. No code changes - YAML config file only. Steps: (1) Run generate-skill-eval.sh resolve-conflicts (2) Confirm TODOs cause eval failure (RED) (3) Read SKILL.md for behavioral properties (4) Replace TODOs with 2-3 test cases exercising: conflict analysis, file classification, resolution strategy, confidence scoring (5) Use Haiku grader (6) Verify assertions pass (GREEN). File: plugins/dso/skills/resolve-conflicts/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml. AC: eval config exists, contains at least 2 llm-rubric assertions, exercises named behavioral properties.
